nasb.text: God will hear and answer them— Even the one who sits enthroned from of old— Selah. With whom there is no change, And who do not fear God.

esv.text: God will give ear and humble them, he who is enthroned from of old, Selah because they do not change and do not fear God.

cnv.text: 神必聽見， 那從亙古坐著為王的必使他們受苦， 因他們不肯改變， 也不敬畏　神。

ccb.text: 永掌王权的上帝必鉴察并惩罚他们， 因为他们顽梗悖逆、不敬畏上帝。

csbs.text: 从太初就坐着为王的神听见了，就苦待他们。细拉 这是因他们不悔改，也不敬畏神。
